title: BigBear.ai (BBAI) Stock Slides 5% Despite Strong Margin Expansion Following Q1 Results
text: BigBear.ai stock slid 5% despite reporting strong margin expansion in Q1 results. The stock's negative reaction stands in contrast to the fundamental improvement in gross margins, which expanded 1,300 basis points to 34% driven by the Ask Sage acquisition and higher-margin AI products. The disconnect between improving operational metrics and stock performance reflects investor concerns about BBAI's path to net profitability and cash generation.
